response.justification: Bogdan brings roughly 20 years of broad software engineering experience and genuine entrepreneurial spirit through his GISCollective platform, but falls significantly short of the Principal/Director-level AI strategist profile this role demands. His AI exposure is limited to a few months of agentic tooling work at re:cinq and lacks the depth, scale, or recognized expertise required to advise strategic customers and partners on cloud and AI adoption. There is no advanced degree in an AI-related field, no history of building or shipping AI-powered products at scale, and no evidence of the executive-level technical leadership or external thought leadership the role requires.
strengths: ~20 years of hands-on engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure, comfortably exceeding the 15-year minimum
Demonstrated entrepreneurial and founder experience through GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform actively used in production
Current involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development at re:cinq signals awareness of and entry into the agentic AI space
concerns: No advanced degree in AI or a related field; highest credential is a BS in Computer Science supplemented by a Fine Arts BA
AI experience is shallow and very recent — limited to the current role started in April 2025 — with no demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized expertise

Seniority and scope gap is significant: career titles peak at Staff Software Developer with no evidence of director-level responsibilities, strategic advisory work, or external thought leadership at scale
